name: 300 MG Abacavir Tablets IP
about: Introducing 300 MG Abacavir Tablets IP, a general medicine used to treat HIV infection. These tablets are manufactured in India and are packaged with 30 tablets per box. The recommended dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. These tablets are to be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain their effectiveness. The physical form of the medicine is in tablet form.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage for 300 MG Abacavir Tablets IP?
faq.a: The dosage should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the origin of 300 MG Abacavir Tablets IP?
faq.a: The medicine is manufactured in India.

faq.q: How many tablets are there per box of 300 MG Abacavir Tablets IP?
What type of medicine is 300 MG Abacavir Tablets IP?
How should 300 MG Abacavir Tablets IP be stored?
faq.a: The medicine should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness.
